data-v-08152fd0>2021</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2020</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2019</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2018</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2017</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2016</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2015</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2014</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2013</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2012</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2011</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2010</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2009</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2008</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2007</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2006</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2005</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2004</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>2003</span></li></ul></div></div></div> <div class=\"content-text\" data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d><div class=\"text-expansion\" data-v-af56f3fc data-v-5d856d4d><div class=\"expansion-content is-closed\" style=\"max-height:40px;cursor:pointer\" data-v-af56f3fc>\nThe Academic Ranking of World Universities (ARWU) was first published in June 2003 by the Center for World-Class Universities (CWCU), Graduate School of Education (formerly the Institute of Higher Education) of Shanghai Jiao Tong University, China, and updated on an annual basis. Since 2009 the Academic Ranking of World Universities (ARWU) has been published and copyrighted by ShanghaiRanking Consultancy. ShanghaiRanking Consultancy is a fully independent organization on higher education intelligence and not legally subordinated to any universities or government agencies. ARWU uses six objective indicators to rank world universities, including the number of alumni and staff winning Nobel Prizes and Fields Medals, number of highly cited researchers selected by Clarivate, number of articles published in journals of Nature and Science, number of articles indexed in Science Citation Index Expanded and Social Sciences Citation Index in the Web of Science, and per capita performance of a university. More than 2500 universities are actually ranked by ARWU every year and the best 1000 are published.\n</div> <div class=\"open-button\" data-v-af56f3fc>\nRead More<img src=\"data:image/svg+xml;base64,\" alt data-v-af56f3fc></div> <div class=\"expansion-button\" style=\"display:none\" data-v-af56f3fc>\nRead Less<img src=\"data:image/svg+xml;base64,\" alt data-v-af56f3fc></div></div></div></div> <img src=\"/images/arwu/arwu_img.png\" alt class=\"banner_img banner_img_arwu\" data-v-5cae0290></div> <div id=\"btns\" data-v-5cae0290><div class=\"btns-wrap btns-wrap-arwu\" data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d><div class=\"btn-item btn-item-first\" data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d><span data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d>Explore ARWU Methodology</span></div> <div class=\"btn-item btn-item-data\" data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d><span data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d>Decode Your University's Ranking Data</span></div> <div class=\"btn-item btn-item-download\" data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d><img src=\"/_nuxt/img/icon_download_white.02dba0b.svg\" alt=\"\" class=\"download-icon unhover-icon\" data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d> <img src=\"/_nuxt/img/icon_download_arwu.d095292.svg\" alt=\"\" class=\"download-icon hover-icon\" data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d>   <span data-v-5cae0290 data-v-5d856d4d>Download Ranking Results in Excel</span></div></div></div></div></div> <div class=\"container mx-auto\" style=\"position:relative\" data-v-5d856d4d><div id=\"main-container\" data-v-5d856d4d><div id=\"rank-content\" data-v-5d856d4d><div id=\"content-box\" data-v-5d856d4d><div class=\"tool-box\" data-v-5d856d4d data-v-5023a5a7><div class=\"table-title\" data-v-5d856d4d data-v-5023a5a7><div data-v-5d856d4d data-v-5023a5a7></div> <div data-v-5d856d4d data-v-5023a5a7>Academic Ranking of World Universities (ARWU)</div> <div data-v-5d856d4d data-v-5023a5a7>\n1000 Institutions\n</div></div> <div data-v-5d856d4d data-v-5023a5a7><div class=\"rank-select\" style=\"width:208px;height:28px\" data-v-08152fd0 data-v-5023a5a7><div class=\"inputWrapper\" data-v-08152fd0><input readonly placeholder=\"\" value=\"All\" class=\"head-bg\" style=\"background:#fff\" data-v-08152fd0> <img src=\"\" alt class=\"nav-icon\" style=\"top:10px\" data-v-08152fd0></div> <div class=\"rk-tooltip\" style=\"min-width:208px;display:none\" data-v-08152fd0><ul class=\"options\" data-v-08152fd0><li class=\"select-active is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox is-checked\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>All</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span Republic</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Denmark</span></li><li data-v-08152fd0>Morocco</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" Zealand</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Norway</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Pakistan</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Portugal</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Qatar</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Russia</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Saudi Arabia</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Serbia</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Singapore</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Slovakia</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Slovenia</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>South Africa</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>South Korea</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Spain</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Sweden</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Switzerland</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Thailand</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>Turkey</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>United Arab Emirates</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>United Kingdom</span></li><li class=\"is-multiple\" data-v-08152fd0><span class=\"option-checkbox\" data-v-08152fd0></span> <span class=\"option-content\" data-v-08152fd0>United States</span></li></ul></div></div> <input placeholder=\"Search for a university\" class=\"search-input\" data-v-5d856d4d data-v-5023a5a7></div></div> <div class=\"rk-table-box\" data-v-5634cf85 data-v-5023a5a7><table class=\"rk-table\" data-v-5634cf85><thead data-v-5634cf85><tr data-v-5634cf85><th style=\"width:100px\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"rk-label\" data-v-5634cf85>World\nRank</span></th><th class=\"align-left\" style=\"width:auto\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"rk-label\" data-v-5634cf85>Institution</span></th><th style=\"width:140px\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"rk-label\" data-v-5634cf85>National/Regional\nRank</span></th><th style=\"width:98px\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-sort-box\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-name\" data-v-5634cf85>Total\nScore</div>  <div class=\"rk-sort\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"sort-normal\" data-v-5634cf85></span></div></div></th><th style=\"width:98px\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-sort-box\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-name\" data-v-5634cf85>Alumni</div> <div class=\"rk-tip\" data-v-5634cf85><img src=\"/_nuxt/img/icon_tooltip.b675387.svg\" alt data-v-5634cf85> <div class=\"tip-content\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"tip-def\" data-v-5634cf85>Number of the alumni of an institution winning Nobel Prizes and Fields Medals. Alumni are defined as those who obtain bachelor's, master's or doctoral degrees from the institution. Different weights are set according to the periods of obtaining degrees. The weight is 100% for alumni obtaining degrees after 2011, 90% for alumni obtaining degrees in 2001-2010, 80% for alumni obtaining degrees in 1991-2000, and so on, and finally 10% for alumni obtaining degrees in 1921-1930. If a person obtains more than one degree from an institution, the institution is considered once only. (<a href=\"https://www.shanghairanking.com/methodology/arwu/2025\" style=\"cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline\">Read full Methodology</a>)</span></div></div> <div class=\"rk-sort\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"sort-normal\" data-v-5634cf85></span></div></div></th><th style=\"width:98px\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-sort-box\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-name\" data-v-5634cf85>Award</div> <div class=\"rk-tip\" data-v-5634cf85><img src=\"/_nuxt/img/icon_tooltip.b675387.svg\" alt data-v-5634cf85> <div class=\"tip-content\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"tip-def\" data-v-5634cf85>Number of the staff of an institution winning Nobel Prizes in Physics, Chemistry, Medicine and Economics and Fields Medal in Mathematics. Staff is defined as those who work at an institution at the time of winning the prize. Different weights are set according to the periods of winning the prizes. The weight is 100% for winners after 2021, 90% for winners in 2011-2020, 80% for winners in 2001-2010, 70% for winners in 1991-2000, and so on, and finally 10% for winners in 1931-1940. If a winner is affiliated with more than one institution, each institution is assigned the reciprocal of the number of institutions. For Nobel prizes, if a prize is shared by more than one person, weights are set for winners according to their proportion of the prize. (<a href=\"https://www.shanghairanking.com/methodology/arwu/2025\" style=\"cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline\">Read full Methodology</a>)</span></div></div> <div class=\"rk-sort\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"sort-normal\" data-v-5634cf85></span></div></div></th><th style=\"width:98px\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-sort-box\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-name\" data-v-5634cf85>HiCi</div> <div class=\"rk-tip\" data-v-5634cf85><img src=\"/_nuxt/img/icon_tooltip.b675387.svg\" alt data-v-5634cf85> <div class=\"tip-content\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"tip-def\" data-v-5634cf85>Number of Highly Cited Researchers selected by the Institute for Scientific Information at Clarivate. The Highly Cited Researchers list issued in November 2024 was used for the calculation of HiCi indicator in ARWU 2025. If a Highly Cited Researcher receives recognition in more than one ESI fields, each field is counted separately. Only the primary affiliations of Highly Cited Researchers are considered. (<a href=\"https://www.shanghairanking.com/methodology/arwu/2025\" style=\"cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline\">Read full Methodology</a>)</span></div></div> <div class=\"rk-sort\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"sort-normal\" data-v-5634cf85></span></div></div></th><th style=\"width:98px\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-sort-box\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-name\" data-v-5634cf85>N&S</div> <div class=\"rk-tip\" data-v-5634cf85><img src=\"/_nuxt/img/icon_tooltip.b675387.svg\" alt data-v-5634cf85> <div class=\"tip-content\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"tip-def\" data-v-5634cf85>Number of research articles published in Nature and Science between 2020 and 2024. To distinguish the order of author affiliation, a weight of 100% is assigned for corresponding author affiliation, 50% for first author affiliation (second author affiliation if the first author affiliation is the same as corresponding author affiliation), 25% for the next author affiliation, and 10% for other author affiliations. When there are more than one corresponding author addresses, we consider the first corresponding author address as the corresponding author address and consider other corresponding author addresses as first author address, second author address etc. following the order of the author addresses. Only publications of 'Article' type are considered. (<a href=\"https://www.shanghairanking.com/methodology/arwu/2025\" style=\"cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline\">Read full Methodology</a>)</span></div></div> <div class=\"rk-sort\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"sort-normal\" data-v-5634cf85></span></div></div></th><th style=\"width:98px\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-sort-box\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-name\" data-v-5634cf85>PUB</div> <div class=\"rk-tip\" data-v-5634cf85><img src=\"/_nuxt/img/icon_tooltip.b675387.svg\" alt data-v-5634cf85> <div class=\"tip-content\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"tip-def\" data-v-5634cf85>Number of papers indexed in Science Citation Index-Expanded and Social Science Citation Index (Web of Science) in 2024. Only publications of 'Article' type are considered. When calculating the total number of papers of an institution, a special weight of two was introduced for papers indexed in Social Science Citation Index. (<a href=\"https://www.shanghairanking.com/methodology/arwu/2025\" style=\"cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline\">Read full Methodology</a>)</span></div></div> <div class=\"rk-sort\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"sort-normal\" data-v-5634cf85></span></div></div></th><th style=\"width:98px\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-sort-box\" data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"rk-name\" data-v-5634cf85>PCP</div> <div class=\"rk-tip\" data-v-5634cf85><img src=\"/_nuxt/img/icon_tooltip.b675387.svg\" alt data-v-5634cf85> <div class=\"tip-content\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"tip-def\" data-v-5634cf85>Weighted scores of the above five indicators divided by the number of full-time equivalent academic staff. If the number of academic staff for institutions of a country cannot be obtained, the average number of academic staff for world top 1000 universities will be used for all institutions in this country. For ARWU 2025, the numbers of full-time equivalent academic staff are obtained for institutions in USA, UK, China, France, Germany, Canada, Japan, Italy, Australia, Netherlands, Sweden, Switzerland, Belgium, South Korea, Czechia, New Zealand, Saudi Arabia, Spain, Austria, Norway, Poland, Israel etc. (<a href=\"https://www.shanghairanking.com/methodology/arwu/2025\" style=\"cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline\">Read full Methodology</a>)</span></div></div> <div class=\"rk-sort\" data-v-5634cf85><span class=\"sort-normal\" data-v-5634cf85></span></div></div></th></tr></thead> <tbody data-v-5634cf85><tr data-v-5634cf85><td data-v-5634cf85><div class=\"ranking top1\" data-v-5634cf85>\n1\n</div></td><td
